resources.string: Programs an M5Stack (Basic, Core2, or CoreS3) with the M5_NightscoutMon or M5Stack_xDripMon firmware
Programs an M5Stack (Basic, Core2, or CoreS3) with the M5_NightscoutMon firmware
Programs an M5Stack (Basic, Core2, or CoreS3) with the M5Stack_xDripMon firmware
Programs an M5Stack (Basic, Core2, or CoreS3) with custom firmware from GitHub
What would you like to flash?
Enter the GitHub repository to flash from. It must contain a Binaries folder with a firmware.json and a Basic_4MB, ESP32_16MB, or CoreS3 build.

You are about to flash firmware that is not part of the M5_NightscoutMon or M5Stack_xDripMon projects. This firmware has not been reviewed, tested, or verified by the author of this app.

The author of this app accepts no liability whatsoever for any damage, loss, malfunction, or injury of any kind arising from flashing firmware that is not part of the M5_NightscoutMon or M5Stack_xDripMon projects, including but not limited to damage to your M5Stack device, your phone, or any connected equipment.

By continuing, you acknowledge that you use this feature entirely at your own risk and accept full and sole responsibility for the firmware you choose to flash.
Set up Wi-Fi on the device
Leave empty for an open network
Password must be empty or 8–63 characters
Why do we ask for this?
Looking for your device on the network…
Couldn\'t find the device automatically. On the M5Stack, press the right button until its QR code and IP address show, or browse to http://%1$s.local

Your Wi-Fi network name and password are written only to your M5Stack, over the USB cable connected to this phone. They are never uploaded, transmitted over the internet, logged, or stored anywhere by this app.

The only internet access this app performs is downloading the M5_NightscoutMon firmware files from GitHub before flashing. That download never includes your Wi-Fi credentials or any other information about you.

The full source code is available for review at github.com/psonnera/M5StackLoader. If you would rather not take our word for it, you are welcome to review the source and build the app yourself instead of installing a prebuilt APK.
